subcodes.first_line: O thou candle aflame with the fire of the love of God! ...During my stay in America I continually encouraged thee to advance in the Kingdom of God.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع افروخته بنار محبت الله نامه شما رسید از مضمون نهایت انجذاب و محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
